'''Kira III''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kira system/Legends|Kira system]].

==Description==
The planet was uninhabitable and had little natural resources that were worth [[Mining/Legends|mining]].<ref name="TSK" />

==History==
The planet was initially surveyed during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. While the second planet of the [[Star system/Legends|system]], [[Kira II]] - designated [[Kira Prime]], was deemed worthy of further developement, Kira III was classified as uninhabitable.<ref name="TSK" />

When a follow-up survey was conducted several years later, Kira III - as well as [[Kira I]] and Kira II had been destroyed by an unknown cataclysm. The remnants of the three planets formed an instable [[asteroid field]], which inherited the name Kira Prime.<ref name="TSK" />

When the [[Kira Run]] was established years later, the asteroids remained a small, but constant hazard for [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel.<ref name="TSK" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->[[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']] {{1stm}}
